settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account preferences and site appearance.
settings.appearanceDesc: Choose how the app looks to you.
settings.faq1_q: How do I add movies to my lists?
settings.faq1_a: Hover over any movie card in the catalog and click the '+' icon. You can also add movies directly from their detailed pages.
settings.faq2_q: What is the difference between Public and Private lists?
settings.faq2_a: Private lists are only visible to you. Public lists will be shared with the community in the 'Discover Public Lists' section.
settings.faq3_q: Can I change the cover of my watchlist?
settings.faq3_a: Currently, the cover is automatically generated using the poster of the first movie in your list. Custom cover uploads are coming soon!
settings.faq4_q: Why don't some movies have trailers?
settings.faq4_a: Please note that when the Ukrainian language is selected, not all movies may have localized trailers available in the database. In such cases, the trailer button will be disabled.
